overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The player walks along a trash-strewn sidewalk past a burning fire, homeless encampments with tents, and encounters an NPC before approaching a corporate building with illuminated signage. The scene features prominent neon lighting, collapsed structures, and dense urban atmosphere characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the large burning trash fire along the metal railing

metal safety railing running along the left side of the path
collapsed building or bridge with purple neon lighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
dark colored sedan parked near the burning trash

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking alongside a large burning trash pile that illuminates the scene with orange light. The player moves along a metal railing with a collapsed neon-lit structure visible in the distance to the left, while palm trees and a parked car are visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the fire area into a homeless encampment featuring green tents on the right and piles of trash bags on the left. A person sits on a concrete bench near the trash, while a collapsed neon structure becomes more prominent on the left. Digital billboards become visible ahead as the fire recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an area with concrete stairs on the right where two NPCs are present - one standing in the path and another sitting on the stairs. The green tent and bench are left behind as the player moves forward, while the collapsed neon structure recedes into the distance on the left.

entered.detail: tall cylindrical corporate building with illuminated 07 signage and vertical neon strips

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a more open plaza area approaching a prominent corporate building marked with an illuminated 07 sign. The previous encampment elements including the NPCs, stairs, and collapsed structure are left behind. The building becomes the dominant feature ahead as the player continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, fire-lit alleyway into a polished corporate plaza. It begins by walking past a large burning trash pile that casts a flickering orange glow over a metal railing and a distant collapsed neon structure. As the fire recedes, the camera moves through a homeless encampment characterized by green tents and piles of trash bags, passing a figure seated on a concrete bench. The scene then shifts toward a set of concrete stairs where two NPCs are encountered, leaving the encampment behind as the collapsed structure fades into the distance. Finally, the path opens into a wide plaza, with the urban decay giving way to the dominant presence of a corporate building marked by a bright, illuminated 07 sign.
